title: OpenAI seals deal in Malta to give all Maltese access to ChatGPT Plus
description: Malta is set to become the first nation to provide all its residents with a year of ChatGPT Plus access. This initiative follows the completion of a free course on artificial intelligence usage. The program begins in May and will expand as more citizens finish the training. Maltese citizens living overseas can also participate.

title: Angara pushes sustainable AI solutions to bridge education system gaps
description: EDUCATION Secretary Sonny Angara underscored the Department of Education’s (DepEd) commitment to deploying artificial intelligence (AI) to simplify school operations and directly address the everyday challenges faced by teachers and learners.

title: When imagination becomes real: How AI is quietly rewriting fashion’s creative rules
description: From AI-generated couture to viral DIY dresses, discover how artificial intelligence is blurring the line between imagination and reality in fashion.
content:
“I had no idea it was AI,” Sunita says. “I just liked the design and thought about it and made it. I will try to make any dress I like, be it AI or not. I just want to bring out the design in its truest sense.”

title: Netflix Working On AI Studio For Short-Form Content
description: Netflix is developing a new artificial intelligence (AI) studio focused on creating short-form content. The company is exploring ways to use generative AI tools to produce short videos and other quick entertainment formats more efficiently
content:

title: CJI calls for deepening technology and AI-based judicial architecture for faster justice delivery
description: Jabalpur, May 16 (PTI) Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant on Saturday called for deepening technology and artificial intelligence (AI)-based judicial architecture, and using technological advancements to expedite justice delivery. Stating that technology was the only effective answer to wastage of judiciary’s time, he said the country’s judiciary was committed to ensuring optimum utilisation […]

title: Ladakh's Educational Leap: IIT Jammu Satellite Campus in Leh
description: The Ladakh Union Territory administration has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with the Indian Institute of Technology Jammu to establish a satellite campus in Leh. This initiative aims to provide world-class educational opportunities to Ladakhi youth, initially offering courses in civil engineering, artificial intelligence, and data science.

title: Revolutionizing Teen Education: Launch of Applied AI Certificate Program
description: HOAG, in collaboration with BITS BioCyTiH Foundation, has launched an online Certificate Program in Applied Artificial Intelligence for students aged 12 to 17. This immersive three-month program aims to evolve teenagers from AI consumers to creators through a structured curriculum emphasizing practical AI solutions, design thinking, and innovation.
